# CWE-379 vulnerable: Creation of Temporary File in Directory with Insecure Permissions (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-379-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

func WriteSessionSnapshot(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) error {
	dir := "/tmp/shared-sessions"
	_ = os.MkdirAll(dir, 0777)
	path := filepath.Join(dir, "snap-"+r.URL.Query().Get("id")+".json")
	err := os.WriteFile(path, []byte(r.FormValue("body")), 0644)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return nil
}
